content_review_batches.legal_safe_note: v0.8.2 initial content review batch; v0.8.6 first source-access review pass on 20 May 2026. Structured review log only; not legal advice. Does not approve client use. verified_on_source_after_check remains false unless explicitly documented per policy.

content_reviews.summary_review_note: Source access 20 May 2026. Official EUR-Lex CELEX URL (32024R1689) matches record title "Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 — Artificial Intelligence Act". Automated curl/WebFetch hit EUR-Lex bot-protection (HTTP 202 / JS challenge); full instrument text not read in this session. Commission AI Act overview page (digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu) links the same CELEX and describes Regulation (EU) 2024/1689 — high-level summary in record is not obviously contradicted. No legal interpretation performed.
content_reviews.date_review_note: Sample key_dates in record remain unverified on EUR-Lex in this session (WAF limitation). Commission page cites entry into force 1 Aug 2024 and phased applicability — curator should align key_dates with official sources in a follow-up pass.
content_reviews.status_review_note: Record legal_status in_force — consistent with published EU regulation; not re-verified on EUR-Lex full text in this session.
content_reviews.legal_safe_note: v0.8.6 source-access review. EUR-Lex WAF limited automated read. Not legal advice. client_use_allowed remains false. verified_on_source_after_check false.

content_reviews.summary_review_note: Source access 20 May 2026. HTTP 200. Visible page title: "AI Act | Shaping Europe's digital future". Official European Commission digital-strategy page on the EU AI regulatory framework, including GPAI implementation topics — aligns with record as a sample pointer to EU AI Office / Commission framework material. Record title mentions GPAI specifically; live page is broader AI Act overview (not GPAI-only). No legal interpretation performed.
